player_notes.shai gilgeous-alexander: Scored 32 points in Game 5 win; no injury concerns noted. Full availability expected for Game 6 closeout attempt vs. Spurs.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Held to 20 points in Game 5; coach explicitly said Spurs need more from him in Game 6. Fatigue has been raised as a concern — monitor output carefully, but no injury/availability issue reported.

game_notes.OKC vs SAS: Thunder lead series 3-2 and are closing out at home in Game 6. Wembanyama under pressure to elevate; Thunder role players (Caruso, Wallace, McCain) contributed heavily in Game 5, suggesting continued balanced scoring distribution for OKC.
